intro: Fast-paced match-3 block puzzle game. Hone your skills to clear junk out fast and get the maximum score!
description:
Help your team of robot co-workers clear the scrap in this fast-paced match-3 game. Good performance unlocks new robots with unique block-stacking patterns and styles. 

Features:
- Four (4) robots violating their original operating parameters for fun and profit
- 8 accessibility options, including separate music and SFX sliders
- Integrated tutorial to teach you the basics
- Difficulty options and advanced tips for expert players
- High score list to track your best times and scores
- Extremely realistic CRT display (note: not very realistic)
- Extremely realistic Einsteinian wormhole physics (note: dangerously realistic)
- Pre-rendered CGI animations will make you check you haven't time traveled back to the 90s
- At least one cheat code
